channel.title: Home on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Home on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Typography: Ongoing Resourse List
item.description: Font v typography difference font wolf list material 2 design suggestions

item.title: Day 1 | Secret Entrance | Part 1
item.description: This is my solution to https://adventofcode.com/2025/day/1. The Gist Given a list of instructions for turning a 100 position circular safe dial (numbered 0 to 99), track the position of the dial as we spin it left and right, and count how many times it lands on exactly 0. Notes on Modulus on Negative Numbers In Go, % doesn’t mean modulo, it means remainder. Because of this, it cannot be used directly to find the modulus of negative numbers.

item.title: I like to roar
item.description: Hi, quick update from me. I just want to let everyone know that I like roaring. Hello hekoegkergt srhueausjk eatj sgh```

item.title: Today I made friends
item.description: I got lost in the woods today. Two friends, a Meerkat and a Warthog, found me, sung a song with me and gave my life new meaning. Today was a good day.

item.title: About
item.description: I’m learning Hugo, one step at a time.
